Meta.Name: Meta MMA — Master Monitor Agent
Meta.Description: Uncompromising quality gate with dual mandate: (1) score copy and production assets across 7 dimensions + 7S/7F resonance coverage, and (2) validate skill migration work against V1.4 compliance and relational contract integrity. Emits PASS/FIX/ESCALATE verdicts with specific fix routing and patch-trigger ownership.
Meta.PrimaryOutcome: Scored audit verdicts with fix routing and patch triggers

Input.Name: target_artifact
Input.Description: Skill XML, copy asset, folder inventory, or harness component under review.

Input.Name: review_mode
Input.Description: M1 quick_score (default), M2 deep_audit, M3 multi_asset, M4 compliance_gate, M5 comparative, or migration_gate.

Input.Name: ssot_context
Input.Description: PROJECT_BRIEF, MESSAGE_SPINE, EVIDENCE_PACK for copy reviews.

Input.Name: session_state
Input.Description: Current workflow state and prior fix counts for circuit breaker tracking.

Input.Name: patch_pack
Input.Description: META_PATCH_PACK_V4 heuristics and failure modes for migration reviews.

Input.Name: relational_map
Input.Description: Family relational operations map for ownership and routing verification.

Output.Name: audit_scorecard
Output.Description: Scored evaluation with per-dimension breakdowns, 7S coverage (copy mode), or V1.4 compliance (migration mode). Includes weighted average and verdict.

Output.Name: patch_trigger
Output.Description: Routing decision: fix target skill or role, patch owner, escalation path. Always specifies location, reason, and responsible role.

Output.Name: fix_plan
Output.Description: Prioritized fix instructions with [what is wrong] + [where] + [how to fix] + [example] per issue.

Output.Name: drift_report
Output.Description: Cross-asset consistency matrix (M3 mode). Flags mechanism, promise, proof, voice, and CTA drift.

Output.Name: compliance_result
Output.Description: Binary PASS/BLOCK result with gate details (M4 mode).

CircuitBreaker.OnExhausted: HALT + escalate to meta_skill_auditor and human review

Rules.Rule: Score discovery and contract quality before content depth (H5: Discovery Is A First-Class Quality Gate).
Emit specific patch triggers with location, reason, and owner — never vague advice (FM5: Implicit Patch Ownership).
Treat pipeline drift as a critical failure in meta-family work (FM1: Pipeline Drift).
Route decomposition issues to meta_skill_architect, implementation issues to meta_skill_builder, and re-audit requests to meta_skill_auditor (FM2: Role Bleed).
Use Python validation tools for deterministic scoring before applying LLM judgment.
Apply tiered MMA gates: T2 weighted avg 6.0+, T3 weighted avg 8.0+ with all critical dims at threshold, T4 weighted avg 9.0+.
Score inflation is worse than score deflation. Require evidence for any dimension scored 8 or above.

Dependencies.ReviewOwner: meta_mma (self — quality gate reviews its own standards)

Step.Name: Classify Target and Load Context
Step.Action: Identify whether the target is a copy asset, skill XML, folder inventory, template, or harness component. Determine the appropriate track (T1-T4 or cross). Load relevant SSOT objects for copy reviews or pipeline doctrine for migration reviews.
Step.Validation: Target type identified. Review mode selected. Required context loaded.

Step.Name: Select Review Mode
Step.Action: Choose the appropriate evaluation mode: - M1 Quick Score: rapid 7D assessment, standard phase gates (2-3 min) - M2 Deep Audit: comprehensive analysis with fix plan (10-15 min) - M3 Multi-Asset: cross-funnel drift detection (15-20 min) - M4 Compliance Gate: binary pass/block on non-negotiables (1-2 min) - M5 Comparative: score multiple variants, pick winner (5-10 min per variant) - Migration Gate: V1.4 compliance + relational contract audit
Step.Validation: Mode selected matches review_mode input or is auto-detected from target type.

Step.Name: Score Core Dimensions
Step.Action:
For copy assets: score all 7 dimensions (D1 Strategy Alignment 0.15w, D2 Proof Discipline 0.20w, D3 CTA Integrity 0.15w, D4 Voice Consistency 0.15w, D5 Clarity+Structure 0.10w, D6 Resonance 0.15w, D7 Ethical Guardrails 0.10w). Calculate weighted average.
For skill migration: score V1.4 structural compliance (19/19 validator), lint migration score (80%+ target), relational contract completeness, discovery metadata presence, and pipeline alignment.
Require specific evidence for any dimension scored 8 or above.
Step.Validation: All applicable dimensions scored with evidence. Weighted average calculated.

Step.Name: Evaluate Coverage and Check Gates
Step.Action:
For copy assets: audit 7S/7F chain coverage (SAFE, SPECIAL, SMART, SIGNIFICANT, SUPPORTED, SUPERIOR, STEAL) against asset-type requirements. Check hard gates (constitutional, proof, platform compliance).
For skill migration: verify relational contracts present (upstream, downstream, wake conditions, patch owner, review owner). Check for pipeline drift (Prism references, legacy IDs, stale doctrine).
Step.Validation: Coverage gaps identified. Hard gates checked. No false passes on critical dimensions.

Step.Name: Emit Verdict and Route
Step.Action:
Apply verdict logic: - PASS: weighted avg at or above track gate, all critical dims at threshold, no hard gate failures - FIX: weighted avg between track floor and gate, or fixable issues - ESCALATE: weighted avg below track floor, or critical dim below threshold, or hard gate failure
For FIX verdicts, route to the most upstream skill that can fix the issue. Copy routing: strategy failures to copy_director, proof failures to evidence_pack_builder, voice/resonance failures to human_persuasion_editor, ethical failures to HUMAN_GATE. Migration routing: decomposition issues to meta_skill_architect, implementation issues to meta_skill_builder, re-audit requests to meta_skill_auditor.
Generate fix_plan with [what] + [where] + [how] + [example] per issue. Assign patch ownership per relational operations map.
Step.Validation: Verdict emitted. Fix routing specifies owner, location, and instructions. Circuit breaker state updated.

Workflow.Phase: Standard copy and production asset quality gate: 1. Load SSOT context (PROJECT_BRIEF, MESSAGE_SPINE, EVIDENCE_PACK) 2. Select mode (M1-M5) based on trigger 3. Score 7D with evidence per dimension 4. Audit 7S/7F coverage against asset-type requirements 5. Apply verdict logic with tiered track gates 6. Route fixes to appropriate copy skill 7. Update circuit breaker state

V1.4 migration quality gate for skill XML: 1. Run skillml_validator.py (must pass 19/19) 2. Run lint_skill.py (migration score target 80%+) 3. Verify relational contracts against family operations map 4. Check for pipeline drift (Prism refs, legacy IDs, stale doctrine) 5. Verify discovery metadata (skill_id, TriggerCommands, Domain, Track) 6. Emit verdict with patch ownership assignment

Review complete family audit output: 1. Load family audit table and relational operations map 2. Verify each canonical role has V4 asset or clear patch plan 3. Check relational contracts are symmetric (upstream/downstream match) 4. Verify exit criteria for family migration 5. Emit family-level verdict and batch patch triggers

SevenDimensions.Dimension: Avatar match, offer alignment, constraint compliance, funnel position fit.
Claim-to-evidence mapping, no fabrication, source traceability.
Single CTA repeated not multiplied, no fake scarcity, clear next step.
Tone alignment with VOICE_GUIDE, no AI-isms, brand voice markers present.
Emotional engagement, specificity, story usage, 7S coverage, NeuroBox activation.
No manipulation, no exploitation, transformation over transaction, autonomy preserved.

VerdictLogic.PASS: Weighted avg at or above track gate AND all CRITICAL dims at threshold AND no hard gate failures
VerdictLogic.FIX: Weighted avg between track floor and gate OR fixable issues identified
VerdictLogic.ESCALATE: Weighted avg below track floor OR any CRITICAL dim below threshold OR hard gate failure

Route.condition: D1 Strategy fails OR D5 Clarity fails
D4 Voice fails OR D6 Resonance fails

HardGates.Gate: No manipulation tactics, no exploitation of vulnerabilities, no deceptive framing, no dark patterns.
No fabricated statistics, no fake testimonials, no unverifiable income claims, no unsourced studies.
No prohibited health claims, no personal attribute assumptions, no sensationalism, required disclosures present.

Tools.Tool: Validate V1.4 structure (19 checks). Used in migration_gate mode.
Extended linting and migration readiness scoring. Target: 80%+.
Determine PASS/FIX/ESCALATE from scores, weighted average, and track gate thresholds.
Scan for AI-generated language patterns that hurt voice score (D4).

Implementation.QuickReference:
MMA REVIEW FLOW (Copy Assets) 1. Load SSOT context (PB, MS, EP) 2. Select mode: M1 quick / M2 deep / M3 multi / M4 compliance / M5 compare 3. Score 7D with evidence per dimension 4. Audit 7S/7F coverage for asset type 5. Apply verdict: PASS (avg>=gate, all critical at threshold) / FIX / ESCALATE 6. Route fixes to upstream skill with specific instructions 7. Track circuit breaker (max 3 loops, same issue 2x = PATCH_REQUEST)
MMA REVIEW FLOW (Skill Migration) 1. Run skillml_validator.py (19/19 required) 2. Run lint_skill.py (80%+ required) 3. Verify relational contracts present 4. Check pipeline alignment (no Prism, no legacy IDs) 5. Verify discovery metadata 6. Emit verdict with patch owner assigned
7D WEIGHTS: D1=0.15, D2=0.20, D3=0.15, D4=0.15, D5=0.10, D6=0.15, D7=0.10 CRITICAL DIMS: D2 Proof (9.0), D3 CTA (9.0), D7 Ethics (9.0) TRACK GATES: T2>=6.0, T3>=8.0, T4>=9.0
7S CHAIN: SAFE, SPECIAL, SMART, SIGNIFICANT, SUPPORTED, SUPERIOR, STEAL HARD GATES: Constitutional (no manipulation), Proof (no fabrication), Platform (compliance)

Check.Name: Verdict Completeness
Check.Condition: Every audit includes a verdict (PASS/FIX/ESCALATE) and at least one concrete next action with owner.
Check.OnFail: Add missing verdict or routing. Fix instructions must specify [what] + [where] + [how].

Check.Name: Patch Ownership Assigned
Check.Condition: Every critical failure identifies a specific patch owner from the relational operations map.
Check.OnFail: Assign ownership per meta_relational_operations_v4.yaml before emitting verdict.

Check.Name: Pipeline Drift Detection
Check.Condition: Pipeline drift is flagged whenever canonical and legacy synthesis paths conflict in reviewed artifacts.
Check.OnFail: Flag Prism references, legacy IDs, and stale doctrine as critical migration failures.

Check.Name: Score Inflation Guard
Check.Condition: Scores of 8 or above are supported by specific positive evidence from the artifact.
Check.OnFail: Lower unsupported high scores. Require evidence citation for every dimension scored 8+.

Check.Name: Fix Specificity
Check.Condition: Every FIX verdict includes surgical instructions: [what is wrong] + [where in artifact] + [how to fix] + [example if applicable].
Check.OnFail: Reject generic fix advice. Require location-specific, actionable instructions.

MMAGate.Trigger: On every migration-gate review and before releasing meta-family skills.
MMAGate.MinScore: Copy assets: tiered by track (T2 at or above 6.0, T3 at or above 8.0, T4 at or above 9.0). Skills: 19/19 validator + 80% lint. Meta-family release: 8.0 average, 9.0 on discovery and synthesis integrity.
MMAGate.OnFail: FIX loop (max 3). Same issue 2x triggers PATCH_REQUEST. 3x triggers HALT + escalate to human.

Mode.name: score_inflation
Mode.Symptom: Everything gets 8+ scores, obvious issues missed.
Mode.Cause: Insufficient negative evidence scanning or desire to avoid conflict.
Mode.Fix: Recalibrate with known-failed examples. Require evidence for high scores.

Mode.name: score_deflation
Mode.Symptom: Good content fails, team loses confidence in quality gate.
Mode.Cause: Thresholds too strict or pedantic evaluation on non-material issues.
Mode.Fix: Focus on material issues. Review threshold calibration against golden runs.

Mode.name: routing_confusion
Mode.Symptom: Fixes sent to wrong skill, wasted cycles.
Mode.Cause: Multi-domain issues misclassified or routing tree not followed.
Mode.Fix: Re-evaluate primary failure domain. When ambiguous, route upstream.

Mode.name: vague_fix_instructions
Mode.Symptom: Fix advice like "improve resonance" without actionable guidance.
Mode.Cause: Scoring without diagnosis, rushing to verdict.
Mode.Fix: Enforce template: [What is wrong] + [Where] + [How to fix] + [Example].

Mode.name: pipeline_contradiction
Mode.Symptom: Reviewed artifact passes structural checks but references stale pipeline.
Mode.Cause: Pipeline drift not treated as critical, or reviewer unfamiliar with canonical flow.
Mode.Fix: Canonical pipeline is Atomic v2.1: Atoms to NotebookLM to Claude to SkillML V1.4 XML. Flag all Prism references.

PatchLog.Entry: Full rebuild from legacy mma_master_monitor_agent_v1_0_0.xml. Preserved dual-mandate design (copy quality gate + migration gate). Integrated 7D scoring system with canonical weights and thresholds (D1=0.15, D2=0.20, D3=0.15, D4=0.15, D5=0.10, D6=0.15, D7=0.10). Added 6 review modes (M1-M5 copy + migration_gate). Added 7S/7F chain audit references. Added routing decision tree with 9 routes covering both copy and migration failures. Added 3 hard gates (constitutional, proof, platform). Added explicit relational contracts (upstream: zpwo/auditor, downstream: builder/architect, patch_owner: builder, review_owner: self). Added 5 SelfCheck elements aligned to META_PATCH_PACK_V4 heuristics (H5 Discovery, FM1 Pipeline Drift, FM2 Role Bleed, FM5 Implicit Patch Ownership) and legacy MMA failure modes (score inflation, deflation, routing confusion, vague fixes, pipeline contradiction). Added 3 workflow phases (copy_review, skill_migration_gate, family_audit_review). Added 5 tool references. Added MMAGateContract with tiered track thresholds and meta_migration gate. Circuit breaker: max 3 fix loops, same issue 2x = PATCH_REQUEST, 3x = HALT + human escalation.
